Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $28,544,157Details
International Box Office $16,499,713
Worldwide Box Office $45,043,870
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $11,734,643
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,728,364
Total $13,463,007

Opening Weekend:$9,527,848 (33.4% of total gross)
Legs:3.00 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:63.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$26,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)

Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $45,335,444

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 4th, 2009 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: March 23rd, 2010 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language and some disturbing violent content.
Running Time: 105 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Foreign-Language Remake, Remake
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Life on the Outside, Love Triangle, POW, Presumed Dead, Relationships Gone Wrong, Returning Soldiers, Romance, War

Subgenre: War Drama
Time period setting: 2000s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action

Production/Financing Companies: Relativity Media
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
